Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Jacob Ash Holdings Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Jacob Ash Holdings Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (L&M302)
